docs.text: Biography ¶ I am a master student in Soochow University, where I am a member of Soochow NLP Lab , majored in software engineering. I am advised by Prof. Peifeng Li . Before that, I obtained the bachelor degree from China University of Petroleum (East China) (UPC, China) , QinDao Institute Of Software, College Of Computer Science And Technology in 2022. More about me ¶ Github Resume Contact Me ¶ Email Research Interests ¶ Natual Language Processing Text Generation Pretrained Language Models Honors & Awards ¶ Special Academic Scholarship of Soochow University, November 2022 Second National Prize , 11 th LanQiao Cup, November 2020 Second National Prize , 12 th LanQiao Cup, June 2021 Bronze medal ,The 2021 ICPC Asia Shenyang Regional Contest, 20 - 21 November 2021 Bronze medal ,The 2021 ICPC Asia Nanjing Regional Contest, 3 – 4 December 2021 Silver Medal , The 2021 ICPC China Shandong Provincial Programming Contest, 9 May 2021
